title: sigillaria biflora
intro: Sigillaria biflora, also known as the cycadeoid plant, is an extinct species of plant that belongs to the order Sigillariaceae and is a type of fossilized conifer. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sigillaria biflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Sigillaria biflora can be found in the form of tinctures, extracts, and capsules, although its availability is limited due to its fossilized nature.
